message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.dropna_columns (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.dropna(axis=1)
(drop columns containing any nulls, the column-wise sibling of the
default row-wise dropna):

- dropna_columns_basic: 3-col frame, middle column "b" has a null;
  result keeps "a" and "c" only
- dropna_columns_no_nulls: 2-col frame with no nulls — frame
  passes through unchanged

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.dropna(axis=1)), runs the Rust DataFrame.dropna_columns(),
and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameDropNaColumns
was already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-cpmom]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
